title: Lachesis measurement semantics — frozen, deterministic over a pinned Clotho weave snapshot

authority.gpt_seat_rulings: docs/runs/lachesis-argo-1/decision-round-3-result.json (relevance formula + identity Ruling A, delegated by The Eye 2026-07-18)

ingestion.input: a committed Clotho thread-ledger weave snapshot (JSONL): 1 clotho_weave_header + N signed edge records + 1 trailer; nodes are IMPLIED by from_locator/to_locator; node ids are bare 64-hex; edge kind is `edge_kind`.
fail_closed: raw-byte sha256 must equal the manifest-pinned digest (syntax sha256:<64hex>); path bound to the manifest, resolved + realpath-contained under rootDir
fatal UTF-8 decode; every line must equal its canonical serialization (merkle-dag canonicalize); no blank lines
structure: lone header first, non-array-object trailer last, edges strictly between; edges carry prev_hash/record_hash/signature (present, NOT crypto-verified)
closed NODE_KINDS (11) / EDGE_KINDS (8) mirror of clotho/registry.mjs@ed0e05c034317331e874ac511c4182580c192620; closed source_ref schemes; self-edges rejected; duplicate (edge_kind,from,to) rejected
locator<->node-id BIJECTION both directions via structural equality (order-insensitive objects, order-sensitive arrays); locator payload present + non-empty object

metrics.dependencies: transitive forward depends-on closure from id, EXCLUDING id (visited-set, cycle-safe)
metrics.blastRadius: reverse depends-on dependents reachable within `depth` hops (default full transitive), EXCLUDING id (visited-set, cycle-safe); returns count + node set
metrics.relevance: raw(v) = 3*D(v) + 2*V(v) + 1*I(v); D=# depends-on edges with to==v, V=# verified-by with from==v, I=# introduced-by with from==v; direct edges only; other kinds weight 0; relevance = raw/max(raw), 0 if max 0. REPORTED, does NOT feed riskClass.
metrics.riskClass: blast-driven: blastRadius(full) >=10 -> high, >=3 -> medium, else low; coverage floor: `low` only when coverage=='attested-complete', else >= medium. ADVISORY.

oracle.test: lachesis/scripts/test-metrics.mjs (discriminating fixtures + golden real-snapshot values) + lachesis/scripts/test-boundary.mjs (source-profile boundary); `npm test` in lachesis/
oracle.status_note: 82 assertions pass, including the current real-snapshot golden projection

change_rule: Any change to the metric semantics, closed sets, or trust posture requires a plan amendment (Daedalus) + TELOS re-authorization + updated oracles + updated adversarial review.
